overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2x Long UEC Daily ETF (UECG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in energy equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Uranium Energy Corp. (NASDAQ: UEC) stock, less fees and expenses UECG was launched on Feb 10, 2026 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
